description: pyngus is a pure-Python client library for the AMQP 1.0 protocol. Useful for building C2 channels over messaging brokers.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/pyngus && python3 pyngus.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/pyngus && python3 pyngus.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/pyngus && python3 pyngus.py --help`. Pure-Python AMQP 1.0 client (Apache Qpid).
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the c2 category. Fits when the engagement needs: Pure-Python AMQP 1.0 client (Apache Qpid).
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Pure-Python AMQP 1.0 client (Apache Qpid).

name: pyngus

trust.notes: Operator-curated Python library. The pip name is resolved from PyPI; the import name is verified against the registry.

use_cases: Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
